horoscopes.title: Aries Weekly Horoscope Starting May 17
content: This week's planetary transits indicate notable activity for all signs. For Aries individuals, especially those with Aries Sun, Moon, or Ascendant, anticipate unexpected developments. This period will be one of the month's busiest. Mars entering your second house suggests potential expenses, so ensure you have sufficient financial resources for the week. Expect to manage responsibilities connected to your home, budgeting, and acquiring new skills. A delayed or outstanding payment is expected to arrive after continued follow-ups. It is advisable to maintain gentle communication when interacting with others.

Gemini season will start during this week, and Mercury also will be there, so you will have a very busy life, as there will be a lot of short trips, for personal and professional reasons. There will be a lot of messages, phone calls, activities in the social media , and constant updates. You will have important conversations about your siblings and they will also update you about their day to day proceedings. There will be plenty of opportunity to write, learn, publish your articles, and they will get vast receptance, so make a good workable plan.

Venus will make a crucial move to the water sign of Cancer, which rules your fourth house, so you can expect better atmosphere at home, or you will feel like the stress at home has been reduced. There will be more communication between the family members, and there will be some pleasant surprises from your guests. You will have home improvement projects, like replacing your cushions, buying new kitchen devices, or even changing the entire home décor. Family events will be peaceful, and you will be the centre of attention.

horoscopes.title: Taurus Weekly Horoscope Starting May 17
content: For Taurus Sun, Moon and rising, Mars is moving through the first house, so there will be a sudden rise in your energy, but make sure you are taking control of yourself, otherwise, there are chances for some injuries, but they will not be serious. You will be very assertive, a bit impatient will take life changing decisions during this time. People around you will notice the shift in your attitude, as you will become intolerable. During this week, you will try to change your appearance, so you will buy new clothes of you will have a haircut. This also shows the opportunities to attend some social gatherings.

The Sun and Mercury are transiting your second house. This period emphasizes your financial assets, transactions, and core values. Anticipate some financial outlays, making prudent spending on essential items advisable to maintain financial stability. For those seeking employment, potential job opportunities and freelance projects may emerge, requiring close attention. This influence enhances the impact of your communication and may bring increased recognition. It is important to express yourself truthfully and with humility.

With Venus entering Cancer this week, influencing your third house, you may engage in increased multitasking. The intensity from Mars and Sun is expected to be softened by this Venus transit. This period will bring enhanced communication through emails, messages, invitations, and spontaneous social outings. Interactions with siblings, friends, and close contacts are likely to be pleasant, offering insights into their current lives. Opportunities may also emerge in communication-focused areas such as teaching, learning, writing, and publishing. Team meetings and business gatherings will also be prominent during this time.

horoscopes.title: Gemini Weekly Horoscope Starting May 17
content: The third week of May will witness Sun transit to Gemini, Mars moving to Taurus, and Venus entering the water sign of Cancer. This is a going to be a very busy week, and the events will be coming faster, so you have to be prepared for that. There will be some emotional hassles as Mars is moving through the twelfth house, so there will be unexpected rise of suppressed anger, and you will be confronting the emotions. You will feel like being alone, detached and there is nothing wrong in taking temporary breaks. There will be some blocks from the daily plans, so you should have plan B.

The Sun will impact the first house, and Mercury is also there, so you will have full attention on your identity, personal life, image and your voice. This planetary duo will force you to take control of the situations, instead of waiting for others to lead. People will surely notice your confidence, communication, style, decisions, more than usual, so this is the week to socialise, even though Mars is going to bring some blocks. This is the time for personal refinement, so you will find some new accessories for yourself.

Venus will enter Cancer, so your financial matters will be safe despite some expenses, and it will also soften your financial pressures. This transit will draw you to better food, beautiful surroundings, quality purchases, and your life will be much calmer. You will also be focusing on investments, budgeting and other crucial financial matters. You will also get some gifts or someone will share a good word with you. This is also a good time for business owners, as they can expect some profits from their ventures. This is a mixed week, but there will growth as well, so you have to control the emotional tantrums.

horoscopes.title: Cancer Weekly Horoscope Starting May 17
content: Four planets will change the sign, they are the Sun, Mars, Mercury and Venus, so there will be a lot of activity. Mars will move into Taurus, so there will be a lot of group activity as Mars will be impacting the eleventh house. However, Mars is a separative planet, so, there will be a sudden change in the group dynamics, and there are chances for hidden competition within the team mates. You will plan for the bigger goals, but remember, you need the support of your team mates, so try to keep peace with them. New team ventures, new friends, and new job offer also can come up.

The Sun and Mercury will be in Gemini , which rules the twelfth house of isolation, detachment, rest and restoration. You will think about closures, especially about some relationship, which were not contributing your mental health. This planetary duo will increase your intuition, and that will make you observe everything around you. You will also go for some meditation session, so that you can be happy and feel fresh when the Sun moves into your first house. Please stay away from all kind of scandals, otherwise this transit may annoy you.

Venus will impact your first house, so you will feel better and this transit is a solution for the issues caused by the Sun and Mars. Venus will draw positive attention towards you, and people will take you seriously. Venus is the charmer of the zodiac, so you will find better opportunities around you from personal and professional space. There will be a strong desire to change your appearance and style so you will buy some accessories or new dress for you. This is a golden opportunity for single natives to find someone special and start a new relationship.

horoscopes.title: Leo Weekly Horoscope Starting May 17
content: This is a very significant week as four planets are changing the sign so, there will be a lot of activity. Mars is moving through the tenth house so, you will have work related pressure, deadlines and discussions with authority figures. Mars is an aggressive planet, so you will have to control your aggressiveness, as you want every work to be done on time, so you will not tolerate any delays. There will be some confrontation with the superiors, so make sure you keep the respect. Job seekers will have the closest opportunities to find a new job, so be alert.

The Sun and Mercury will enter Taurus, so this season will be all about joining new team, and making new friends. There will be a lot of conversations with friends, colleagues, and team mates from personal and business domain too. Job seekers among you will have the closest opportunities to join a new job, so be alert, as there are chances for you to miss some phone calls, or emails about these opportunities. This is also a time to get foreign collaborations, attend parties and meet likeminded people. If you were planning to start a venture, you will get a splash of ideas.

Venus is moving through the twelfth house, so it will create an emotional environment around you, which is not bad. Venus likes to be in the twelfth house, so you will feel the need of isolation and detachment, as you feel the need to get healed. Your hidden feelings will come out, and you will seek some clarification about the emotional issues which you go through. This transit will also increase secret attraction, nostalgia, and you will get some updates about your connections from the past. You will also have beautiful dreams, where the universe will send some signals about the future.

horoscopes.title: Virgo Weekly Horoscope Starting May 17
content: The Virgos around the world will try to explore more as Mars will move into Taurus, which rule the ninth house. You will have a push towards expansion, and you want a big result from your life, so you will be spending more time searching for the meaning of the life. There will be plans connected to travel, education, legal matters or education, so this is going to be a very busy week. There will be opportunities for writing, publishing, and work in the media. Martian transit will intensify the energy in debates, so there are chances for arguments with elders.

The Sun and Mercury will move into the tenth house, so your career and public image will be of utmost importance. You will be highly visible in the professional front, and your seniors will watch your activities. Those who work in planning, counting, administration will have a lot of work and they have to multitask. There will be multiple meetings, interviews, debates, and one to one discussion for business deals. You will be bothered about the status, so you will do anything to protect that. If you work hard, you will get influential contacts too, so use this time for your career growth.

Venus transit through the eleventh house is very much supportive of your social interactions and team ventures. Venus is a natural benefic, so you will have very good events happening in your life especially regarding money and friendships. New friends will come up, or you will work with a fresh business plan. If you are working with own ventures, you will make some long term plan to expand it. This is a very good time for attending parties, brainstorming session, and you will join new groups too. The people around you will surely be supportive and motivating.

horoscopes.title: Libra Weekly Horoscope Starting May 17
content: Four planets will be changing the signs during this week, so the third week of May will be full of activities, but there are some challenges too. Mars, the planet for financial liabilities will be moving into Taurus, which rules the financial matters, so you will have to make more money, as there will be a lot of expenses. There are chances for some arguments at home with your spouse or business partner regarding financial transactions too. You will have discussions regarding loans, tax, PF, insurance and other financial instruments. Mars in this transit will force you to act fast, but you should take time to think and also in decision making.

The Sun and Mercury will move into Gemini, which rules your ninth house, and that will make you think about higher studies, religion , faith and belief system. This transit also will bring people from the foreign lands, or you yourself will go for a long trip, for personal or business purpose. There will be a lot of conversations regarding higher studies, legal matters, trave; plans, and you will get some guidance from your teachers and mentors. This is a bright opportunity for those who work in writing and publishing related domain.

Venus will move into the water sign of Cancer, which will bring more positivity to the workplace, so the work pressure will get reduced a lot. The intensity created by Mars will be mellowed down by Venus, and you will find better options to make more money through work. Venus will help you to maintain diplomacy and grace at work, so there will be more perfection and clarity to the work. Job seekers will get positive updates about their job, and they will also be able to perform well in the interviews. This is also a good time to get positive review for your work as well.

horoscopes.title: Scorpio Weekly Horoscope Starting May 17
content: Your ruler Mars will be changing signs during this week so you will focus on your personal and professional relationship more than anything. Despite being your ruler, Mars is a separative planet, so you have to be careful with your relationships, as there are chances for issues, which force direct conversations, and strong emotional reactions. However, this Mars will increase passion, attraction, competitiveness, and conflict at the same time with everyone around you. You will also get many chances to attend social gatherings like parties; business meets or some of you will go for dating. At the same time, Mars will never allow you to tolerate disrespect, and imbalance in the relationships.

The Sun and Mercury will enter Gemini, so there will be a lot of discussion about your money matters, especially about financial liabilities. You will become very critical about every penny you spend, and you will investigate better methods to make more money. However, the expenses will be higher, so you need to control it, otherwise you will have financial crunch. Freelance projects also will come up, but you may disagree with the terms and conditions, still you should see the benefit in them. This is also a week which you will think about tax, PF and insurance.

There will be some updates from the foreign lands, as Venus will move into Cancer, so you will plan for long trips, or a global venture. This Venus is a very positive one, so your faith in God will be high, and there will be divine blessings too. You will also spend more time with learned people, and that will boost your confidence. This transit will bring opportunities for higher studies, writing and publishing too. If you were trying to get a legal work done, there will be positive updates about that.

horoscopes.title: Sagittarius Weekly Horoscope Starting May 17
content: The Sun, Mars, Mercury and Venus will be changing signs during this week, and that will bring a lot of activity in your life. You will be interacting with more people, as all these planets will be covering matters where you have to meet or confront others. To begin with Mars will be moving into the sixth house of work, health and colleagues, so you will have more work pressure, and it can end in confrontations. So, make sure you behave properly at work, and avoid personal talks with anyone. There will be minor digestive issues also, so you have to follow a strict diet.

The Sun and Mercury will enter Gemini, which rules your relationship sector, and that will bring more interaction in a one -one mode or with a large group. Single Sagittarius Sun natives will have the closest opportunities to find someone special, but they should be diplomatic so that you can find a balance in the relationship. If you were looking for a business or job contract, the chances will be active for the next thirty days. This is a good time for business owners, as they will get fresh ideas, but kindly avoid risky investments.

Venus transit through the eighth house is definitely going to improve your financial matters, but you should control your expenses as well. Venus is a natural benefic, so this transit will bring more money , and it can be through a job, freelance opportunity, or someone will be ready to financially support you. There will be more activity with your partner, and if you had some issues, then you will get many chances to solve them. You will also learn about new investment plans, loans, tax, PF and insurance during this week. This transit is going to last for twenty eight days, so you have ample time to settle your financial liabilities too.

horoscopes.title: Capricorn Weekly Horoscope Starting May 17
content: Four major transits are going to happen this week, so that means you will have a lot to do. Mars will move into Taurus, which rules your fifth house, so you will be emotionally charged, creative, and romantic too. You will be passionate about your hobbies, and will try to set up some business with that. This is a good time for self-promotional activities, as the Martian rays will force people to notice your work. Single Capricorn natives will have the closest time to find someone special, but please take time to know each other. You will also have some important assignments for children, social gatherings and entertainment events too.

The Sun and Mercury will move into Gemini, and this going to bring big shifts at work, and also in your health also. You will be busier, and some unnoticed errors will be noticed by you. Job seekers will have the closest opportunities to find a new job, so they should not miss any calls or messages. Please stay away from workplace gossips, otherwise, you will have to face ugly confrontations. Your health is also important, and you will be able to solve some issues by taking up new health care practices.

Venus is making a beautiful transit to the water sign of Cancer, which will impact your relationship. From various angles, relationships are going to be an important part, so you have to make sure you use this opportunity to find someone or settle the existing issues. There will be meetings for new business projects, but make sure you read all the terms and conditions too. This week will also bring team gatherings like weddings, parties or business meets where you meet new people, but kindly avoid oversharing. Long trips, and foreign collaborations are also going to be the part of this transit.

horoscopes.title: Aquarius Weekly Horoscope Starting May 17
content: For Aquarius Sun, Moon and rising signs, the family matters will be very important as Mars will be moving into the fourth house. Mars itself is the planet for land related deals, so you will have to focus on such deals, but make sure you get the best one. Mars is a separative planet, so you will have some tension at home, and there will be frequent arguments. Family meetings, home improvement projects, repairs, and relocation is also possible during this time. You will also have to support the elderly figures at home, as they can have some physical issues too.

The Sun and Mercury will be entering Gemini, and this is going to bring strong focus on your creativity, romance and personal enjoyment. You will be very passionate about your creative skills, and you will try to start a new venture with your skills. There will be a lot of conversation regarding new business, and you will go for business network meetings, which can be online or offline. Parents will take up more responsibilities regarding children, as they will also have some projects. Single Aquarius natives will have the closest opportunity to find someone, but that doesn’t guarantee a long lasting relationship too.

Venus will enter Cancer, which will impact your workplace, so you will go for some workplace meets where you find new team mates. The workplace environment will improve and that will be a relief. You will be able to solve some of the workplace issues, and you will be able to perform better. Job seekers will have the closest opportunities to find a job, so they should not miss any job calls or messages. However, the health can be a bit sensitive, as Venus will increase the desire for junk food, so you need to control that.

horoscopes.title: Pisces Weekly Horoscope Starting May 17
content: Martian transit will enter Taurus, which rules your third house, so this will make this week fast-paced. You will have nonstop communication, which can be a bit tiring as well. Your conversation can be a bit offensive so avoid such talks online or offline, especially while commenting on the social media. There will be more work from sales, communication, writing , publishing and IT as well. You will meet your siblings, cousins or neighbours in one to one set up, but arguments are also possible. Short travels, constant moving and usage of electronic devices also will increase during this week.

The family matters also will be important as the Sun and Mercury will enter Gemini, which rules your fourth house of family. You will be more reflective about your emotional roots, and inquisitive to know about your family matters. There will be family meetings, real estate deals, home improvement projects, and relocation related discussions as well. The Sun doesn’t fit in the fourth house, so you will have some arguments at home as well especially with elders. These planets will aspect the tenth house of career too, so you can expect work from home opportunities also. Job seekers will have the closest opportunity to find a new job.

Venus will enter Cancer, which is a very beautiful transit, as it will bring some solution for all your stress related to the Sun and Mars transit. You will find better opportunities to promote your skills, and you will get public recognition for your work as well. During this week there are chances for you to go for movies, musical nights or other entertainment events as well. New friends, new groups and new business ideas will capture your attention. The time with children or someone special also is showing up, which will keep you very lively.
